documentation.readme: Features • Installation • Usage • Running AlterX • Join Discord
usage_sections: Features: - Fast and Customizable - Automatic word enrichment - Pre-defined variables - Configurable Patterns - Pattern Mining - Automatically discover subdomain patterns (Go port of Regulator) - STDIN / List input - Multiple operation modes (default, discover, both)

Installation: To install alterx, you need to have Golang 1.19 installed on your system. You can download Golang from here. After installing Golang, you can use the following command to install alterx:

arguments.name: -en
arguments.description: enrich wordlist by extracting words from input

arguments.name: -enrich
arguments.description: enrich wordlist by extracting words from input

arguments.name: -es
arguments.description: estimate permutation count without generating payloads

arguments.name: -estimate
arguments.description: estimate permutation count without generating payloads

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --version
arguments.description: Print the tool version and exit.

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

arguments.name: --capture
arguments.description: Capture mode: write packets to a pcap file.

examples: Fast and customizable subdomain wordlist generator using DSL.

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with projectdiscovery/uncover (score=10); pair in the chain planner.

Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the recon category. Fits when the engagement needs: Features • Installation • Usage • Running AlterX • Join Discord.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Features • Installation • Usage • Running AlterX • Join Discord.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: go install github.com/projectdiscovery/alterx/cmd/alterx@latest; git clone https://github.com/projectdiscovery/alterx.git. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `go install github.com/projectdiscovery/alterx/cmd/alterx@latest`. Further invocations from upstream: `go build ./cmd/alterx`; `make install       # Install to $GOPATH/bin`. Features • Installation • Usage • Running AlterX • Join Discord.
